tree.setup: Your bike gets a flat tire near the community gate. The security guard, Uncle Guo, notices and comes to help.
tree.setup_zh: 你的自行车在小区门口爆胎了。保安郭叔叔看到了，走过来帮忙。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 车胎爆了啊？别着急，巷子口有一个修车的师傅，很便宜也很快。我先帮你把车推过去。
turns.text_pinyin: Chē tāi bào le a? Bié zháojí, xiàngzi kǒu yǒu yī ge xiū chē de shīfu, hěn piányi yě hěn kuài. Wǒ xiān bāng nǐ bǎ chē tuī guòqù.
turns.text_en: Flat tire? Don't worry — there's a bike repairman at the alley entrance, cheap and fast. Let me help you push the bike over.

options.text_zh: 谢谢郭叔叔！还好有你在，不然我都不知道附近有修车的。太感谢了！
options.text_pinyin: Xièxie Guō shūshu! Háihǎo yǒu nǐ zài, bùrán wǒ dōu bù zhīdào fùjìn yǒu xiū chē de. Tài gǎnxiè le!
options.text_en: Thank you, Uncle Guo! Lucky you're here — otherwise I wouldn't even know there's a repairman nearby. Really grateful!
options.feedback: Genuinely grateful and acknowledges his local knowledge.

options.text_pinyin: Xièxie, wǒ zìjǐ néng tuī guòqù.
options.text_en: Thanks, I can push it there myself.
options.feedback: Refuses help when he's already offering.
Focuses on bad luck instead of the help offered.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 客气什么！我天天在这里，这种事见多了。以后有什么事尽管来找我。这个小区的事我都清楚。
turns.text_pinyin: Kèqi shénme! Wǒ tiāntiān zài zhèlǐ, zhè zhǒng shì jiàn duō le. Yǐhòu yǒu shénme shì jǐnguǎn lái zhǎo wǒ. Zhège xiǎoqū de shì wǒ dōu qīngchǔ.
turns.text_en: No need for formality! I'm here every day — I've seen it all. If you ever need anything, just come find me. I know everything about this neighborhood.

options.text_zh: 郭叔叔，您是我们小区的宝藏！改天我给您带点茶叶，感谢您一直照顾大家。
options.text_pinyin: Guō shūshu, nín shì wǒmen xiǎoqū de bǎozàng! Gǎi tiān wǒ gěi nín dài diǎn cháyè, gǎnxiè nín yīzhí zhàogù dàjiā.
options.text_en: Uncle Guo, you're a treasure of our neighborhood! I'll bring you some tea leaves another day — thank you for always taking care of everyone.
options.feedback: Warm and plans a reciprocal gesture — perfect.

tree.cultural_note: Security guards (保安) are unsung heroes of Chinese community life. They know every resident, every repair shop, and every hidden shortcut. Calling someone a 「宝藏」 (treasure) is a warm modern compliment. Offering tea leaves as thanks is a classic gesture of gratitude.
